name: Masterworks 7: Grisha Goryachev, guitar & Mozart Requiem
description: ★ Rating: 7/10 🎭 Artistic Merit – Grisha Goryachev delivered precise runs in Rodrigo's Concierto de Aranjuez, his fingers navigating the famous adagio's cascading arpeggios with clean articulation; the orchestra matched his tempo in the lively finale, though…
